ApexClass.description: Nightly cleanup batch that discovers expired Failed and Cancelled jobs and fires MetadataDependencyDeletionBatch to remove them. Scheduled at 02:00 by DependencyCleanupScheduler. Implements Database.Stateful to accumulate job IDs across execute() chunks. Must NOT delete Completed, Processing, Initializing, or Paused jobs. Max 5 MetadataDependencyDeletionBatch submissions per finish() call.
